dataset_name: IBM AML-Data HI-Small Protocol B v2

baseline_results.name: chronological_queue
baseline_results.notes: Chronological queue ordered by created_at ascending.

baseline_results.name: weighted_signal_heuristic
baseline_results.notes: Validation-tuned weighted heuristic over normalized amount, transaction count, and counterparty breadth.

current_protocol_b_reference.name: althea_protocol_b_logistic_regression_reference
current_protocol_b_reference.notes: Reference Protocol B v1 logistic regression retrained on the base strict feature set.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_sparse_logistic_base
candidate_results.notes: Sparse saga logistic regression over the strict Protocol B base feature space.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_sparse_logistic_graph_entropy
candidate_results.notes: Sparse saga logistic regression over the strict Protocol B base feature space plus a validation-selected past-only feature subset.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_sparse_logistic_recent_entropy
candidate_results.notes: Sparse saga logistic regression over the strict Protocol B base feature space plus a validation-selected past-only feature subset.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_sparse_logistic_behavior_shift
candidate_results.notes: Sparse saga logistic regression over the strict Protocol B base feature space plus a validation-selected past-only feature subset.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_logistic_regression
candidate_results.notes: Enhanced strict Protocol B logistic regression with past-only temporal, graph, and behavior-shift features.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_logistic_regression_hardneg
candidate_results.notes: Enhanced strict Protocol B logistic regression with hard-negative weighting for alerts that rank highly on amount and heuristic baselines but remain negative.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_lightgbm
candidate_results.notes: Enhanced strict Protocol B LightGBM over past-only temporal, graph, and behavior-shift features.

candidate_results.name: protocol_b_v2_lightgbm_hardneg
candidate_results.notes: Enhanced strict Protocol B LightGBM with hard-negative weighting focused on amount-heavy false-positive lookalikes.

champion.name: protocol_b_v2_sparse_logistic_graph_entropy
champion.notes: Sparse saga logistic regression over the strict Protocol B base feature space plus a validation-selected past-only feature subset.

ablations.name: ablation_amount_features_v2
ablations.notes: Removed amount totals, normalized amount, and recent amount-share features.

ablations.name: ablation_history_temporal_features_v2
ablations.notes: Removed prior-anchor history, multi-window temporal, and behavior-shift features.

ablations.name: ablation_payment_currency_mix_features_v2
ablations.notes: Removed payment-format, currency-mix, entropy, and mix-shift features.

ablations.name: ablation_graph_network_features_v2
ablations.notes: Removed counterparty concentration, breadth, novelty, and network-shape features.

hard_negative_strategy.description: Negative alerts in the top 10%-20% of amount/weighted-heuristic rankings receive extra loss weight during training.

baseline_results.name: chronological_queue
baseline_results.notes: Chronological queue ordered by created_at ascending.

baseline_results.name: weighted_signal_heuristic
baseline_results.notes: Validation-tuned weighted heuristic over normalized amount, transaction count, and counterparty breadth.

primary_result.name: althea_protocol_b_logistic_regression
primary_result.notes: Protocol B primary candidate: past-24h observation features only, future-24h labels only, no train-only label encodings, no pattern-derived shortcut features.

ablations.name: althea_protocol_b_logistic_regression
ablations.notes: Protocol B primary candidate: past-24h observation features only, future-24h labels only, no train-only label encodings, no pattern-derived shortcut features.

ablations.name: ablation_history_features
ablations.notes: Removed account-history features derived from prior protocol-B anchor windows.

ablations.name: ablation_payment_currency_mix_features
ablations.notes: Removed payment-format, currency-mix, and temporal mix features.

ablations.name: pattern_derived_control
ablations.notes: Control run that reintroduces past-window pattern-derived features. Excluded from the primary benchmark because they remain leakage-like shortcuts relative to real bank operations.
